title: Living in Boulder vlogf 8 -  2 -  2018: Trying to pick up my room.

enrichment.summary: Kyle films a casual vlog from Boulder on August 2nd, 2018, while trying to organize his room after acquiring new items including a TV, Xbox, and electric bike. He rambles about Forza Horizon 3, a project to map real-world locations onto game/web maps, his libertarian socialism ideas, and various room reorganization efforts including replacing a chair with a floor bed for his back pain.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: entrepreneurs should brag about knowledge rather than wealth
Google did it poorly — roads through walls, uniform grass, buildings floating above ground
he believes he is the only person who could do it correctly

stances.topic: sleeping on the floor vs chair
stances.position: lying flat in bed is better for his back than sitting in a hard chair all day
